## Summary

Describe the change.

## Why

Explain the problem, motivation, or user impact.

## Testing

List the commands or checks you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated if install steps, flags, output, or workflows changed
- [ ] Demo or screenshots reviewed if terminal output changed
- [ ] Release or packaging impact considered if manifests or artifacts changed

## Linked issue

Reference the related issue, if any.
